entries.evidence_summary: Prior-round prompt context now persists review outcome, unresolved items, and improvements_applied in round-summary.json and reuses those exact values instead of synthesizing approximate prior context.
Evidence-path extraction now throws when a referenced path is not boxable, and the shared repair engine boxes authorities under their relative source paths instead of flattening them to basenames.

Pre-board blocked exits now write a pushback artifact and a zero-round run-postmortem, and cycle-postmortem KPI fields now use explicit validation and self-check arrays instead of a mislabeled aggregate.
